# youtube-edit-kit

> Agent skill: one source video in -> a clean YouTube cut out (silence/filler
> cuts, burned corrected captions, SRT + chapters) plus vertical shorts.
> Free and local: ffmpeg + faster-whisper, no API key.

For agents that cannot `git clone`: read the files below via raw URLs, in this
order. Adopt SKILL.md's gates and hard rules as binding.

## Entry point

- [SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/SKILL.md): gates G0-G6, hard rules, red flags — read FIRST
- [BOOTSTRAP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/BOOTSTRAP.md): session prompt for harness-less agents

## References (read at the gate that names them)

- [references/SETUP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/references/SETUP.md): required tools + verify commands
- [references/EDIT.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/references/EDIT.md): full pipeline — transcribe, EDL, fillers, render, burn
- [references/CAPTIONS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/references/CAPTIONS.md): caption bible — timeline mapping math, ASR corrections, sync verification
- [references/SHORTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/references/SHORTS.md): shorts bible — moment selection, hook titles, first-frame rule

## Scripts (runnable CLIs; run these instead of improvising ffmpeg)

- [scripts/transcribe.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/transcribe.py): faster-whisper word-level transcription (cached)
- [scripts/gen_edl.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/gen_edl.py): silence-cut EDL, keep-windows, cut subtraction
- [scripts/scan_fillers.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/scan_fillers.py): disfluency scan (review-first)
- [scripts/render_cut.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/render_cut.py): per-segment render + lossless concat
- [scripts/scan_terms.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/scan_terms.py): correction-candidate miner (proper nouns, jargon, numbers, onomatopoeia) — agent reviews, blocking before burn
- [scripts/gen_srt.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/gen_srt.py): output-timeline SRT + chapters
- [scripts/gen_shorts.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/crealwork/youtube-edit-kit/main/scripts/gen_shorts.py): vertical shorts builder (hook title + captions)

## Lineage

Distilled from [longform-to-content](https://github.com/crealwork/longform-to-content)
(full webinar/lecture pipeline: relayout, thumbnails, publishing). Upgrade there
when the job outgrows this kit.
